title: phlomis russeliana
intro: Phlomis russeliana, also known as Russian phlomis or Jerusalem sage, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Phlomis russeliana include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Phlomis russeliana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in capsules or added to skincare products due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties.
